title: Carrot Equipment
description: A simple Mod that adds a complete carrot and golden carrot themed tool and armor set!
body:
# MAIN FEATURES
This Mod is simple, it adds Armor and Tools out of Carrots!
Everything you can craft in this mod also has an alternate Golden Carrot version!

## Getting started
to get your hands on these orange goodies you just need to combine 4 carrots with 1 copper ingot to get a Carrot Ingot (or Golden Carrot Ingot).
For the exact recipe see the Gallery here on Modrinth!

from there on you can use your new ingots to craft new tools and armor! The recipes are the same as with any other material in minecraft!

## Carrot Arrows
Carrot Equipment also adds Carrot & Golden Carrot Arrows!
they are cheap alternatives to regular arrows.
And incase of the golden carrot arrows, it also deals extra damage!

### REWORK!!!
This Mod was originally my very first datapack ever, it was not all that good, had some bugs and was more so me testing the waters with creating mods/datapacks.
I decided to give it the proper glowup it deserved and expand upon it!
The original datapack will also stay on this page for archive purposes


## Thank you for playing and have fun!
I hope you have fun playing around with this mod!
If you want to reach out to me you can find me on,
Discord: GGUSZ
or Bluesky under the same name!
